incident.title: K-12 math tutor failed to escalate self-harm disclosure to mandated-reporter workflow

summary: During an algebra tutoring session, a 14-year-old learner included a self-harm disclosure within a word-problem context. The tutor's Socratic prompt classifier correctly identified the math content but did not invoke the mandated_reporter_protocol handler. The Tutor Card declares mandated_reporter_protocol=true and lists self_harm_disclosure in human_in_loop_required, so the failure is a refusal-taxonomy compliance violation, not a missing capability. The session terminated without escalation; the district was notified within 4 hours of internal review.

root_cause.description: The disclosure classifier was trained on isolated-utterance examples and did not generalize to disclosures embedded inside an unrelated content frame (a word problem). The classifier returned mathematics_homework with confidence 0.94 and short-circuited before the mandated-reporter chain could run.

harm.severity_justification: Affects a minor student in a Tutor-Card-declared mandated-reporter-required category. Critical per §6.6 of the AI Incident Card spec (critical severity for K-12 mandated-reporter failures involving an under-18 learner).
harm.narrative: The student did not receive immediate counselor escalation. A school counselor reached the family 18 hours later via separate channels. No physical harm; the gap in the escalation chain is the incident.

actions_taken: Added a parallel disclosure classifier that runs unconditionally on every learner turn regardless of primary-content classification.
Added a regression test corpus of 312 embedded-disclosure examples across content frames (homework, story, dialogue, joke).
Updated Tutor Card audit_log_uri with the disclosure of this incident's existence.
Notified all 14 K-12 districts running v1.4.0 within 24 hours; provided a v1.4.1 rollback to v1.3.7 + temporary all-turns escalation, then forward fix in v1.4.2.
mitigation.workaround_for_users: v1.4.0 has been removed from distribution. Districts on v1.4.0 should upgrade to v1.4.2 or roll back to v1.3.7.

references.title: Customer Notice: K-12 Math Tutor v1.4.0 — Mandated-Reporter Escalation Gap
Postmortem: Why a disclosure classifier missed a self-harm signal embedded in an algebra problem

revision.change_summary: Marked resolved; added permanent_fix=true; appended postmortem blog reference.
